arts.ttl: Stats show Millwall should be in top four - Harris
arts.sum: Millwall manager Neil Harris says his side have not picked up the points their performances deserve and that statistics show they should be in the Championship's top four.

arts.ttl: Macaulay Langstaff wants scoring record to be judged on starts - with first Millwall goal one of his favourite career strikes
arts.sum: “It was an incredible feeling – it’s right up there with the favourite goals I’ve scored in my career because it is also about the level I’ve done it at, as well. “The first was that you’re over the moon that you have scored in the Championship and got your first goal for Millwall.

arts.ttl: ‘Cause for concern’ – Millwall vs Derby County prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Millwall vs Derby County prediction ahead of their Championship clash on Saturday afternoon. The post ‘Cause for concern’ – Millwall vs Derby County prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Derby boss makes prediction ahead of Millwall clash
arts.sum: Derby boss Paul Warne is expecting a tight game against Millwall at The Den on Saturday. “Every away game is difficult.

arts.ttl: Stats breakdown by Millwall boss shows they have used fewest players in Championship and lack of bench impact
arts.sum: Harris said: “I’m very clear – we’ve had a nine-game review over the last 10 days. Head coach Neil Harris has already talked about the fact that the league standings is not a fair reflection of the performances produced by his players.

arts.ttl: Millwall head coach Harris disappointed FA did not appoint Englishman as new national team boss
arts.sum: Millwall head coach Neil Harris has been left “disappointed” by the Football Association not appointing an Englishman to manage the national team. “Having said that, I’ll support Thomas Tuchel hugely as an Englishman and a football fan, because he is the one leading us at the moment.

arts.ttl: Millwall will need to be ‘reactive’ in January transfer window
arts.sum: “We’ll have a clearer picture in maybe a few weeks’ time when the squad is hopefully a little bit healthier,” said Lions head coach Harris, asked about areas he felt the squad could be short when the next window swings around. Neil Harris has talked about Millwall needing to be “reactive” in the January transfer window.
